title_en: Scholarly Reception: A Classic of Islamic Practical Ethics
title_id: Penerimaan Keilmuan: Sebuah Karya Klasik Etika Praktis Islam
content_id:
Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din segera diakui sebagai karya klasik etika praktis Islam setelah penulisannya dan telah mempertahankan statusnya selama lebih dari satu milenium. Ini adalah salah satu dari sedikit karya etika Islam pra-modern yang membahas seluruh rentang perilaku praktis — dari karakter pribadi hingga hubungan sosial hingga tata kelola — dalam satu risalah komprehensif, dan komprehensivitas ini telah menjadikannya secara konsisten berguna bagi ulama, pendidik, dan praktisi dalam berbagai konteks.

Dalam tradisi Syafi'i, karya ini sangat dihargai dan telah diajarkan di lembaga-lembaga pendidikan di seluruh dunia Arab, Turki, dan Anak Benua India. Integrasinya antara ketepatan yurisprudensi dengan kebijaksanaan praktis menjadikannya sangat dihargai dalam tradisi menggabungkan pembelajaran hukum dengan pendidikan karakter — sebuah kombinasi yang ditekankan oleh ulama-ulama Syafi'i sebagai esensial bagi pembelajaran Islam yang sejati.

Pengaruh karya ini meluas di luar lingkaran Syafi'i karena universalitas subjek materinya. Pertanyaan-pertanyaan tentang karakter pribadi, perilaku sosial, dan etika tata kelola bukan merupakan keprihatinan spesifik mazhab tetapi keprihatinan bersama seluruh tradisi Sunni, dan ulama-ulama dari tradisi Hanafi, Maliki, dan Hanbali juga telah menemukan nilai dalam perlakuan komprehensif al-Mawardi. Kesediaan buku ini untuk mengambil dari kebijaksanaan berbagai tradisi — Arab, Persia, dan Yunani — sambil mendasarkan segalanya dalam kerangka Islam menjadikannya mudah diakses oleh budaya keilmuan kosmopolitan dunia Islam.

Pada periode modern, Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din telah diterbitkan dalam berbagai edisi dan dipelajari baik di lembaga-lembaga pendidikan tradisional maupun universitas-universitas modern. Perlakuannya tentang etika tata kelola telah menarik perhatian khusus dari para ulama yang mengerjakan pemikiran politik Islam, karena ia memberikan pelengkap yang lebih berorientasi praktis terhadap analisis hukum teknis Al-Ahkam as-Sultaniyyah. Beberapa komentar dan penjelasan telah ditulis tentang karya ini untuk membuat isinya lebih mudah diakses oleh pembaca kontemporer.

Integrasi kebijaksanaan praktis dengan nilai-nilai Islam dalam karya ini juga telah menarik perhatian dari ulama-ulama yang tertarik pada sejarah etika Islam dan hubungannya dengan tradisi-tradisi etika lainnya. Apropriasi selektif al-Mawardi atas kebijaksanaan filosofis Yunani dalam kerangka Islam adalah contoh historis dari jenis keterlibatan dengan berbagai tradisi intelektual yang kadang-kadang diperdebatkan oleh pemikir-pemikir Muslim kontemporer.
content_en:
Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din was quickly recognized as a classic of Islamic practical ethics after its composition and has retained its status across more than a millennium. It is one of the few pre-modern Islamic ethical works that addresses the full range of practical conduct — from personal character to social relationships to governance — in a single comprehensive treatise, and this comprehensiveness has made it consistently useful to scholars, educators, and practitioners across different contexts.

Within the Shafi'i tradition, the work is highly regarded and has been taught in educational institutions across the Arab world, Turkey, and the Indian subcontinent. Its integration of jurisprudential precision with practical wisdom made it particularly valued in the tradition of combining legal learning with character education — a combination that Shafi'i scholars emphasized as essential to genuine Islamic learning.

The work's influence extended beyond Shafi'i circles because of the universality of its subject matter. Questions of personal character, social conduct, and the ethics of governance are not school-specific concerns but shared concerns of the entire Sunni tradition, and scholars from the Hanafi, Maliki, and Hanbali traditions have also found value in al-Mawardi's comprehensive treatment. The book's willingness to draw on the wisdom of multiple traditions — Arabic, Persian, and Greek — while grounding everything in an Islamic framework made it accessible to the cosmopolitan scholarly culture of the Islamic world.

In the modern period, Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din has been published in numerous editions and studied in both traditional educational institutions and modern universities. Its treatment of the ethics of governance has attracted particular interest from scholars working on Islamic political thought, since it provides a more practically oriented complement to Al-Ahkam as-Sultaniyyah's technical legal analysis. Several commentaries and explanations have been written on the work to make its contents more accessible to contemporary readers.

The work's integration of practical wisdom with Islamic values has also attracted attention from scholars interested in the history of Islamic ethics and its relationship to other ethical traditions. Al-Mawardi's selective appropriation of Greek philosophical wisdom within an Islamic framework is a historical example of the kind of engagement with multiple intellectual traditions that contemporary Muslim thinkers sometimes debate.
content_ar: Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din was quickly recognized as a classic of Islamic practical ethics بعد its composition and has retained its status across more than a millennium. It is one of the few pre-modern Islamic ethical works that addresses the full range of practical السلوك — from personal الأخلاق to social relationships to governance — in a single comprehensive treatise, and this comprehensiveness has made it consistently useful to العلماء, educators, and practitioners across different contexts. Within the الشافعي التراث, the work is highly regarded and has been taught in educational institutions across the Arab الدنيا, Turkey, and the Indian subcontinent. Its integration of jurisprudential precision with practical الحكمة made it particularly valued in the التراث of combining legal learning with الأخلاق education — a combination that الشافعي العلماء emphasized as الجوهري to genuine Islamic learning. The work's influence extended beyond الشافعي circles لأن of the universality of its subject matter. Questions of personal الأخلاق, social السلوك, and the ethics of governance are not school-specific concerns but shared concerns of the entire Sunni التراث, and العلماء from the الحنفي, المالكي, and الحنبلي traditions have أيضاً found value in al-Mawardi's comprehensive treatment. The الكتاب's willingness to draw on the الحكمة of multiple traditions — Arabic, Persian, and Greek — بينما grounding everything in an Islamic framework made it accessible to the cosmopolitan العلمي culture of the Islamic الدنيا. In the modern period, Adab ad-Dunya wad-Din has been published in numerous editions and studied in both التقليدي educational institutions and modern universities. Its treatment of the ethics of governance has attracted particular interest from العلماء working on Islamic political thought, بما أن it provides a more practically oriented complement to Al-Ahkam as-Sultaniyyah's technical legal analysis. Several commentaries and explanations have been written on the work to make its contents more accessible to contemporary readers. The work's integration of practical الحكمة with Islamic values has أيضاً attracted attention from العلماء interested in the history of Islamic ethics and its relationship to other ethical traditions. Al-Mawardi's selective appropriation of Greek philosophical الحكمة within an Islamic framework is a historical example of the kind of engagement with multiple intellectual traditions that contemporary مسلم thinkers sometimes debate.
